member.name: T:Prime.DcService.DcResults
member.summary: DcResults.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.DcResults.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DcService.IPinGroupDcResults},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.DcResults.SlicePerPinMeasurements(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Get a vector{double} contains ALL measurements per single pin/pinGroup.
member.returns: Vector{Vector{double}} , each Vector{double} represent single measurement. all measurements per pin| | number of measurements per pin or PinGroup.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.DcResults.PrintToDatalogCompressFormatWithPinMap(Prime.DcService.DcSetup)
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog in compress format using pin unique identifier instead the pinName.
member.param: per pin limits - first low , second high.

remarks.para: This method require to be defined a PinMap through the PinService, PinMap should be specified in PinService.json file loaded by aleph infrastructure.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.DcResults.PrintToDatalogCompressFormat(Prime.DcService.DcSetup)
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog in compress format.
member.param: per pin limits - first low , second high.

member.summary: DcTest Limits.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.DcService.DcResults.Limits.LoLimit
member.summary: Gets the Lo limit value.

member.name: P:Prime.DcService.DcResults.Limits.HiLimit
member.summary: Gets the Hi limit value.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.DcService
member.summary: DC Service.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of measure type per pin.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.DcTest.ApplyLevels
member.summary: To be overriden by specific DcTest implementation.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.DcSetup
member.summary: Dc setup for all measurements.

member.name: P:Prime.DcService.DcSetup.PerPinDcSetupData
member.summary: Gets all Dc Setup data for all pins or group.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.IDcResults
member.summary: Stored Dc Results for all pinGroups.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcResults.PrintToDatalog(Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel,Prime.DcService.DcSetup)
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog.
member.param: provide control over printing data to Ituff - ALL - prints both pass and fail data , FAIL - prints fail.
per pin limits - first low , second high.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcResults.PrintToDatalog(Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel,Prime.DcService.DcSetup,System.String)
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog.
member.param: provide control over printing data to Ituff - ALL - prints both pass and fail data , FAIL - prints fail.
per pin limits - first low , second high.
optional tag to add to tname.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcResults.GetAllPinGroupsDcResults
member.summary: Returns all measured pingroups results.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcResults.GetPinGroupDcResults(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all measured pingroups results.
member.param: pingroup name whose results needs to be retrieved.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel
member.summary: The datalog level for Ituff printout(ALL, FAIL_ONLY, COMPRESS, PINMAP_COMPRESS).

member.name: F:Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel.ALL
member.summary: Print fail and pass results.

member.name: F:Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel.FAIL_ONLY
member.summary: Print fail results only.

member.name: F:Prime.DcService.DatalogLevel.PIN_DETAIL
member.summary:
Print DPS pin name and SuperPinGroup (if used), Pin Channel is printed as a comnt if pin failed. ###########################################################################################################################################
2_tname_"MyTestInstanceName"_"MySuperPinGroupName"_"MyPinName"_"MyCustomPosFixText" 2_mrslt_"MyPinResult" 2_msunit_MyValueUnit 2_comnt_FailData_"MyChannelNumber"
Note: - TIN = Test Instance Name - SPG = Super Pin Group name (if used) - PN = Pin Name - PF = Post fix text (if used) - DR = Double Result - U = Unit - CN = Channel Number (if pin failed comnt line is printed)
Example: 2_tname_MyTestInstanceName_MySuperPinGroup1_MyPinName1_MyCustomPostFix 2_mrslt_0.3450 2_msunit_V 2_tname_MyTestInstanceName_MyPinName2_MyCustomPostFix 2_mrslt_-0.0230 2_msunit_V 2_comnt_FailData_2
Example note: - First ituff has myPinName1 defined in MySuperPinGroup, Result is pass. - Second ituff has myPinName2 no defined in any super pin group but has result failed and printed the channel in last line.
###########################################################################################################################################

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.IDcService
member.summary: This Service handles all DC related activities.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcService.GetLevelDcWithoutSmartTc(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates DC test with LevelsTc block provided, forced to apply levels ignoring SmartTc cache.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcService.GetLevelDcTestWithSmartTc(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates DC test with LevelsTc block provided, applies levels only if different to SmartTc Cache.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

members.member:
Creates DC test without LevelsTc block provided.
List of measure pins. Measurement type - Current or Voltage. The session context of this operation. /// DcTest object.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcService.CreateDcResults(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}}},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create DcResults with grouped results in a dictionary.
member.param: Results grouped by pinGroups and pins.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcService.MergeDcResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DcService.IDcResults},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Merge multiples DcResult in unique object.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.IDcTest
member.summary: A DC Test to be executed.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcTest.Execute
member.summary: Executes DC test and retrieve the measurements results.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IDcTest.SetSuperPinGroup(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}})
member.summary: Set SuperPinGroup to show as a token in ituff result with datalogLevel=PIN_CHANNEL.
member.remarks: The use of this method is intended for Verify only. Please avoid the use in Execute for test time, It apply for all execute calls.
member.param: Dictionary with pinName or PinGroup as key and SuperPinGroup name to link as value.

member.name: T:Prime.DcService.IPinDcResults
member.summary: Stored Dc Results for a pin.

member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to console.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IPinDcResults.GetSuperPinGroupName
member.summary: Return SuperPinGroup name.
member.returns: If exist return superPinGroup, otherwise return empty.

member.name: M:Prime.DcService.IPinDcResults.SetSuperPinGroupName(System.String)
member.summary: Set SuperPinGroupName linkened with this pin.
